analysis.object: T525: NS Structural Inaccessibility v3 depth analysis

godel_parallel.description: NS inaccessibility is structurally analogous to Gödel incompleteness
godel_parallel.reason: Both show EML-finite systems cannot prove EML-inf claims about themselves

proof_depth_ceiling.description: All known proof techniques (energy, spectral, probabilistic) are EML-3 at most
proof_depth_ceiling.reason: EML-3 proof methods cannot cross EML-inf blow-up barrier

inaccessibility_theorem.description: 3D NS regularity may be permanently outside EML-finite axiomatic reach
inaccessibility_theorem.reason: Independence result analogous to CH independence of ZFC
